text.content: Danvers, Massachusetts, Oct 8th, 2025 - MAXAM tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, announces the release of the

rich_text.plain_text: Danvers, Massachusetts, Oct 8th, 2025 - MAXAM tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, announces the release of the

text.content: MS501 MineXtra in a new 45/65R45 size

rich_text.plain_text: MS501 MineXtra in a new 45/65R45 size

text.content:
for L5 wheel loaders and heavy-duty mining machinery, continuing its strong reputation in the OTR industry. Designed for applications operating in harsh aggregate and mining environments, the new 45/6545 MS501 provides a long-lasting, rugged solution for L5 applications.

Built for the harshest environments in mining and quarries, the MS501 features an extra-deep, open L5 offset lug pattern with staggered tread blocks, providing superb wear and damage resistance in all off-road conditions. In addition, the MS501 incorporates a square shoulder design and wide footprint, maximizing stability and ride comfort. For increased cut resistance, the MS501 has a reinforced bead, shoulder, and sidewall. To minimize downtime, MAXAM has integrated cut and tear-resistance compound into the tire, ensuring the lowest cost-per-hour for operations globally.

"Focusing on maximizing L5 application’s resilience and durability in the toughest environment, we aim to amplify operational productivity. With the off-the-road market facing increasing demands and new equipment’s technological advancements, the 45/65R65 MS501 addition is another indication of MAXAM’s pledge to design only the most capable solutions for the industry,” says Matt Fagan, Director of R&D at MAXAM Tire North America.

For more information on the
